authors: Alex Researcher, Taylor Demo, and Morgan Lee

abstract: This demo paper studies how a robot policy can adapt from a small number of demonstrations while preserving task-relevant visual attention. Replace this abstract with the real paper abstract or leave it blank until the final version is public.
